faqs.question: How long does drain fly treatment take in East Flatbush?
faqs.answer: Most drain fly treatments in East Flatbush properties take 1-2 hours depending on the severity of the infestation and the number of drains affected. Our technicians will inspect all potential breeding sites, treat affected drains with bio-enzymatic cleaners and foaming agents, and provide prevention recommendations. Follow-up visits may be scheduled if needed to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: Why do I have drain flies in my East Flatbush home?
faqs.answer: Drain flies thrive in the organic buildup that accumulates in drain pipes, which is common in East Flatbush's older buildings with aging plumbing. They breed in the slimy film inside drains, particularly in bathrooms, kitchens, and basement floor drains. High humidity, infrequent drain use, and organic debris create ideal breeding conditions for these pests.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 drain fly treatment?
faqs.answer: Our drain fly treatment includes a thorough inspection of all drains and potential breeding sites, professional-grade bio-enzymatic treatments to break down organic matter, mechanical cleaning of affected drains, application of targeted insecticides when necessary, and detailed prevention guidance. The price varies based on property size, number of drains, and infestation severity. We also include a follow-up inspection to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: Are drain fly treatments safe for my East Flatbush home and family?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved, eco-friendly products that are safe for families, pets, and the environment. Our bio-enzymatic drain cleaners naturally break down organic matter without harsh chemicals, and any additional treatments are applied with precision to minimize exposure. You can typically resume normal drain use within hours of treatment, making it convenient for busy East Flatbush households.
